mapper.select: SELECT m.*, u.username AS sender_name, u.avatar AS sender_avatar FROM message m LEFT JOIN user u ON m.sender_id = u.id WHERE m.conversation_id = #{conversationId} ORDER BY m.create_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message(conversation_id, sender_id, content, is_read, create_time) VALUES(#{conversationId}, #{senderId}, #{content}, 0, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT m.*, u.username AS sender_name, u.avatar AS sender_avatar FROM message m LEFT JOIN user u ON m.sender_id = u.id WHERE m.conversation_id = #{conversationId} ORDER BY m.create_time DESC LIMIT 1
